name: Wavy Stripe Beach Towel Teal/White - Sun Squad™
description:
Treat yourself after fun waterside activities with this Wavy Stripe Beach Towel from Sun Squad™. It is adorned with wavy teal stripes on a white backdrop to add cute vibes to your beach gear. The lightweight beach towel is made of cotton in a terry weave that's perfect for spreading out on the sand while soaking up the sun and wrapping around your waist after a quick dip in the pool.

Sun Squad™: Ready for fun.
